entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop grown in submerged fields that serves as a source of atmospheric methane

entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological process of ammonia oxidation that can be retarded by inhibitors

entities.description: The various chemical changes nitrogen undergoes in soil environments

entities.name: NITROUS OXIDE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The generation of nitrous oxide gas, which can be reduced by nitrification inhibitors in upland soils

entities.name: UPLAND SOILS
entities.description: Non-flooded soils where nitrification inhibitors reduce nitrous oxide production
